requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — GEOSTM-Adopted IEC Standards and Enclosure Protection
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——GEOSTM采用的IEC标准及外壳防护
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——GEOSTM採用的IEC標準及外殼防護

summary.en: Georgia adopts IEC and EN standards through GEOSTM (Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology), which is the national standardization body aligned with the EU DCFTA technical-barrier-to-trade obligations. IEC 61851-1 is the applicable baseline for conductive EV supply equipment general requirements, covering control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, and emergency stop provisions where applicable. IEC 61851-23:2023 (second edition) addresses DC EV charging stations. Georgian project owners, procurement authorities, and charge-point operators commonly require IEC-family safety evidence before accepting charger installations. Enclosure protection must be appropriate for the installation environment: IP54 minimum for outdoor installations is commonly required, with IP65 recommended for exposed outdoor DC stations. IK08 or higher mechanical protection is expected for public-access chargers in Georgia's urban environments.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚通过GEOSTM（格鲁吉亚国家标准与计量局）采用IEC和EN标准，该机构依据欧盟《深度及全面自由贸易区协定》技术性贸易壁垒义务与欧盟对接。IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备通用要求的适用基线，涵盖控制导引、保护接地、绝缘监测、互锁、过流及过温保护，以及适用时的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）适用于直流电动汽车充电站。格鲁吉亚项目业主、采购机构和充电点运营商通常在接受充电桩安装前要求提供IEC体系安全证据。外壳防护须适配安装环境：室外安装通常要求至少IP54防护等级，外露室外直流充电站建议IP65；格鲁吉亚城市环境中面向公众的充电桩须达到IK08或更高机械防护等级。
summary.zht: 喬治亞通過GEOSTM（喬治亞國家標準與計量局）採用IEC和EN標準，該機構依據歐盟《深度及全面自由貿易區協定》技術性貿易壁壘義務與歐盟對接。IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備通用要求的適用基線，涵蓋控制導引、保護接地、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流及過溫保護，以及適用時的急停措施。IEC 61851-23:2023（第二版）適用於直流電動汽車充電站。喬治亞項目業主、採購機構和充電點運營商通常在接受充電樁安裝前要求提供IEC體系安全證據。外殼防護須適配安裝環境：室外安裝通常要求至少IP54防護等級，外露室外直流充電站建議IP65；喬治亞城市環境中面向公眾的充電樁須達到IK08或更高機械防護等級。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment (second edition)
IEC 61851-24 — Digital communication between a DC EV charging station and an EV for control of DC charging
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code) — IP54 / IP65 outdoor
IEC 62262 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures for electrical equipment against external mechanical impacts (IK Code)
GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (geostm.gov.ge)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023 (Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements, in force April 2024), which corresponds structurally to IEC 61851-1 but incorporates China-specific connector, signaling, and communication requirements. GB/T 18487.1-2023 test evidence is useful as a design starting-point reference but does not substitute for IEC 61851-accredited test reports required by Georgian project owners, GEOSTM conformity assessment, or DNO technical conditions. GB/T safety evidence must be supplemented with an IEC 61851 clause-level gap assessment and, where required, accredited IEC test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023（电动汽车传导充电系统第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其结构上对应IEC 61851-1，但包含中国特有的接口、信号及通信要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023测试证据可作为设计起点参考，但不能替代格鲁吉亚项目业主、GEOSTM合格评定或配电网运营商技术条件所要求的IEC 61851认可实验室测试报告。GB/T安全证据须辅以IEC 61851逐条差距评估，以及在要求时提供ILAC认可实验室出具的认可IEC测试报告。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023（電動汽車傳導充電系統第1部分：通用要求，2024年4月生效），其結構上對應IEC 61851-1，但包含中國特有的接口、信號及通訊要求。GB/T 18487.1-2023測試證據可作為設計起點參考，但不能替代喬治亞項目業主、GEOSTM合格評定或配電網運營商技術條件所要求的IEC 61851認可實驗室測試報告。GB/T安全證據須輔以IEC 61851逐條差距評估，以及在要求時提供ILAC認可實驗室出具的認可IEC測試報告。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements (in force April 2024)

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety test reports from an ILAC-recognised laboratory, DC-station IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, IP54 / IP65 / IK08 test certificates appropriate to the installation environment, protective device ratings, thermal evidence for Georgia's climate range (including cold-weather operation in mountainous regions), and installation instructions aligned with Georgian DNO or project requirements. A standalone GB/T 18487 test report is not accepted as IEC 61851 compliance evidence without a clause-level gap assessment. EAC/TR CU safety certificates are not applicable — Georgia is not an EAEU member.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、ILAC认可实验室出具的IEC安全测试报告、直流产品的IEC 61851-23证据、适配安装环境的IP54 / IP65 / IK08测试证书、保护器件额定值、适配格鲁吉亚气候范围（包括山区低温运行）的热环境证据，以及符合格鲁吉亚配电网运营商或项目要求的安装说明。单独的GB/T 18487测试报告在未完成逐条差距评估的情况下，不被视为IEC 61851合规证据。EAC/TR CU安全证书不适用——格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟成员。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、ILAC認可實驗室出具的IEC安全測試報告、直流產品的IEC 61851-23證據、適配安裝環境的IP54 / IP65 / IK08測試證書、保護器件額定值、適配喬治亞氣候範圍（包括山區低溫運行）的熱環境證據，以及符合喬治亞配電網運營商或項目要求的安裝說明。單獨的GB/T 18487測試報告在未完成逐條差距評估的情況下，不被視為IEC 61851合規證據。EAC/TR CU安全證書不適用——喬治亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory under GEOSTM-adopted IEC standards; IEC 61851 compliance evidence required by Georgian project owners and DNOs; IP/IK enclosure protection required for outdoor installations; EAC/TR CU route does not apply
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence in Georgia without additional accredited testing; EAC/TR CU is inapplicable

source.publisher: GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design starting point only. Georgia-facing EVSE documentation must include IEC 61851-1 accredited evidence and IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, IP/IK-rated enclosure certificates appropriate for the installation environment, and thermal review for Georgia's climate range. Do not use EAC/TR CU safety certificates — they are not applicable in Georgia.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计起点。面向格鲁吉亚的EVSE文件必须包括IEC 61851-1认可证据、直流充电站的IEC 61851-23证据、适配安装环境的IP/IK防护等级认证书，以及针对格鲁吉亚气候范围的热环境审查。不得使用EAC/TR CU安全证书——其在格鲁吉亚不适用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計起點。面向喬治亞的EVSE文件必須包括IEC 61851-1認可證據、直流充電站的IEC 61851-23證據、適配安裝環境的IP/IK防護等級認證書，以及針對喬治亞氣候範圍的熱環境審查。不得使用EAC/TR CU安全證書——其在喬治亞不適用。
